_comment: Codified gate-mode designations for LangChain/LangGraph migration stories. Authored 2026-04-22 from the triage pass across the 56-story plan in _bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics-langchain-langgraph-migration.md. The triage RE-AFFIRMED the existing per-story designations — dual-gate is applied only where a story introduces a schema-shape, CI/compile-time contract, lane/package boundary, load-bearing invariant preservation, or operator-acceptance gate. Every other story is single-gate. Stories 2b.2-2b.14 are explicitly pinned to single-gate here (they follow the 2b.1 TEMPLATE scaffold and should not relitigate gate mode at authoring time). Freezing these designations here means bmad-create-story on a migration story does not need to rederive the gate-mode decision — it reads this file. Additions or demotions require party-mode consensus and a version bump below.
_amendment_log: 2026-04-22 — Initial freeze of 56-story plan (1-1 through 5b-4); 1-1d added via middle-path party-mode consensus on MCP-in-Slab-1.

2026-04-25 — Story 2a-5 added (Generator auto-emit pyproject.toml C3 ignore_imports row; 2a.1 follow-on defect; ~2pt single-gate; party-mode T2 2026-04-24 ratification per Murat (b)-preferred path / Winston path-2 / Paige A12 procedural-coupling category). Filed as the Slab-2a→2b binding gate per slab-2a-retrospective.md.

2026-04-26 — Story 5a-3 substrate-aware amendment (operator-ratified this session). Original spec (≥50% cost-reduction bar vs primary-repo baseline + cited non-existent app/runtime/model_cascade.py) halted Codex T1: legacy code does not capture per-call token data; primary baseline file does not exist; cited cost source absent. Repointed to cost-engineering foundation: parameterized OpenAI cascade in runtime/config/model_cascade.yaml (Marcus=gpt-5; mid-tier specialists=gpt-5-mini; narrow=gpt-5-nano), config-file pricing in runtime/config/openai_pricing.yaml, per-trial cost reports at state/config/runs/<trial-id>/cost-report.{json,md}, soft-cap budget telemetry via MARCUS_TRIAL_BUDGET_USD, per-agent drift alerts (rolling 5-trial median ±50%), characterization baseline on migrated runtime (NOT primary comparison). Pts 3→5; K-target ~1.3×→~1.4× (target 14 / floor 10). Gate stays single. 5a-4 + 5a-5 references to ≥50% bar amended in lockstep. Operator-ratified D1-D9 are binding.

2026-04-27 - Story 6-1 added as Slab 6 inaugural production-capability opener after A16 Composition-vs-Component Audit Gap. Gate is dual (`substrate_shape` + `operator_acceptance_gate`) because it introduces the production graph composition layer and requires one operator-accepted live trial through the runner.

2026-04-27 - Story 6-0 inserted before 6-1 after A17 Substrate Designed for Isolation, Composition Assumed. Gate is dual (`substrate_shape` + `invariant_preservation`) because it introduces the production envelope substrate while preserving isolated specialist scaffold contracts. Story 6-1 re-scoped to runner-consumes-substrate.

2026-04-27 - Stories 6-2 + 6-3 + 6-4 + 6-5 added as Slab 6 trial-experience bundle. 6-2 is the prerequisite (manifest dependency_map promotion; ~1pt single-gate; closes Composition Spec §12 known limitation #1). 6-3 + 6-4 + 6-5 are the bundle proper (Step 02A defaults; Irene Pass 2 authoring template; HUD per-step summaries). 6-3 + 6-5 single-gate; 6-4 dual-gate (`schema_shape + invariant_preservation`). All operator-flagged from 2026-04-19/20 trial-prep evidence; sequenced for first-tracked-trial readiness.

2026-04-27 - Story 6-2 implementation landed: `dependencies` field accepted on manifest nodes; compile-time circular dependency check added; production runner resolves manifest first and retains runner-layer fallback permanently for undeclared/empty nodes.

2026-04-28 - Slab 7a 7a-1 through 7a-8 added (Inter-Gate Conversational Orchestration substrate; per `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics-slab-7a-inter-gate-orchestration.md`). Eight stories: 7a-1 directive_composer (dual-gate); 7a-2 manifest fold-flags + compiler ext (single-gate); 7a-6 vocabulary registry + parity-table (single-gate; promoted to wave-3 from wave-6 per Step 1 batch-approved adjustment); 7a-3 pre-gate-marcus shared LLM node (single-gate); 7a-4 per-slide subgraph + HTML review-pack skeleton (single-gate WITH k_contract bounding HTML to skeleton-only + tripwire escalation to dual-gate at K-actual >4.08K = 1.7× band-floor); 7a-5 conversation persistence + specialist-summary writer (single-gate); 7a-7 A2 single-decision shims for terminal gates (single-gate); 7a-8 integration + parity-test suite + Slab 7a closeout (dual-gate; flipped from single per integration-tier risk argument). Party-mode consensus 2026-04-28 (Winston/Murat/Amelia/Paige) — all four voices: GO; no SG-1/SG-2/SG-3 violations.

2026-04-29 — Slab 7b 7b-1 through 7b-12 RATIFIED (party-mode Round-(e) governance-JSON freeze gate; voices: John+Mary+Amelia+Murat; verdict: GO unanimous on consolidated amendment block E1-E7; per `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics-slab-7b-specialist-activation-eleven.md` Round-(d) close). Twelve stories per Phased Wave Plan: 7b-1 Texas hardening (single-gate; Class A; carries Errata 3 SanctumParityTestBase + NFR-CG14a chain-test base + NFR-I12 class-conformance validator + Errata 4 subdir-vs-flat ratification as T1 CREATE-tasks); 7b-2 Quinn-R hardening (single-gate; Class A; prerequisite_stories=[7b-1] per Round-(e) E5/Murat); 7b-3 Vera hardening (single-gate; Class A; prerequisite_stories=[7b-1] per Round-(e) E5/Murat); 7b-4 Irene Pass-1 refresh (single-gate; Class B); 7b-5 Tracy port-shape + sidecar bundle (single-gate; Class C+; Codex per NFR-CG17; required_ac_reference_paths includes Texas retrieval-contract per Round-(e) E4/Amelia; k_contract block per Round-(e) E6/Murat); 7b-6 Gary port-shape (single-gate; Class C; Codex; consumes FR107 sandbox-AC `gamma`); 7b-7 Kira port-shape (single-gate; Class C; Codex; consumes `kling`; conditional_gate_override on 7b-6 first-port tripwire per Round-(e) E3/Mary); 7b-8 Enrique port-shape (single-gate; Class C; Codex; consumes `elevenlabs`; conditional_gate_override on 7b-6 first-port tripwire per Round-(e) E3/Mary); 7b-9 Wanda port-shape onto scaffold (single-gate; Class C; Codex; consumes `wondercraft`); 7b-10 Dan greenfield (single-gate; Class D1; Claude; sandbox-AC `dan-api-tbd-pending` resolved at story-T1 — if third-party-API, party-mode + version-bump pre-promotion required per Round-(b) Mary B1 amendment; k_contract block per Round-(e) E6/Murat); 7b-11 Compositor greenfield (single-gate; Class D2 sidecar variant per D20; Claude; conditional_dual_gate_escalation hard-bound at K>4.0 per Round-(e) E1/John binding-hard amendment; consumes FR111 scaffold-v0.2-D2-pipeline LANDED Wave 0; k_contract block per Round-(e) E6/Murat); 7b-12 integration + parity-suite + closeout (DUAL-GATE; integration; Claude; trial-2 cost-projection dry-run AC per Round-(a) John A1 amendment; 5-API live-binding smoke operator-gated; k_contract block per Round-(e) E6/Murat). Round-(e) consolidated amendment block (E1-E7): E1 conditional_dual_gate_escalation on 7b-11; E2 top-level tripwire_escalation_record_path → sprint-status.yaml::tripwire_events (lockstep yaml-schema follow-on landed in same commit); E3 conditional_gate_override on 7b-7+7b-8 keyed to 7b-6 tripwire; E4 required_ac_reference_paths on 7b-5; E5 prerequisite_stories=[7b-1] on 7b-2+7b-3; E6 k_contract blocks on 7b-5/7b-10/7b-11/7b-12 per 7a-4 precedent; E7 unfreeze (this _amendment_log entry revised in-place with ratifying voices; `_staged_pending_party_mode_ratification` flags removed; version bumped to `2026-04-29-slab7b-twelve-stories`; triage_summary updated 72→84 total / 20→21 dual / 21/84≈25% dual-gate-pct). Round-(e) record (orchestrator): opening verdicts 4× GO-with-concern (six JSON-encoding gaps surfaced; none re-opens of Round (a)-(d) policy); Round-(e)-confirm vote 4× GO unanimous on E1-E7.

2026-05-04 — Slab 7c 7c-0a through 7c-21a RATIFIED (party-mode Round 2 2026-05-04; voices: John+Winston+Amelia+Murat; verdict: GO unanimous 4/4 on single-epic decomposition + AMEND-7 (a/b/c/d) + Winston structural triplet (W1 7c.0 split + W2 C4/C5/C6 consolidation at 7c.0a + W3 extend-and-audit named gate-mode) + Amelia process-discipline triplet (P1 7c.2 path-isolation guard + P2 NEW CYCLE freshness check + P3 Wave-3 G2C-fanout staggering + P4 extend-and-audit frozen-hash delta-AC) + JTBD gap audit; per _bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics-slab-7c-orchestrational-tail.md). 36 stories per Wave 0..6 plan: Wave 0 (7c-0a + 7c-0b; both dual-gate cross-agent MANDATORY); Wave 1 (7c-1 dual-gate + 7c-2 single-gate with AMELIA-P1 path-isolation guard parallel to 7c.0a/0b + 7c-3a dual-gate cross-agent MANDATORY + 7c-3b dual-gate); Wave 2 (7c-4a single-gate + 7c-4b dual-gate cross-agent MANDATORY + 7c-5-g0/g2a/g5/g6 single-gate fresh-author + 7c-5-g1/g2c/g3/g4 NEW gate-mode dual-gate-cross-agent-CONTRACT-EVOLUTION extend-and-audit per Winston W3); Wave 3 (7c-6..7c-15 all single-gate; 7c-9/7c-10/7c-11/7c-12 carry AMELIA-P3 dispatch staggering >=30 min apart keyed off 7c.5.G2C close); Wave 4 (7c-17a + 7c-17b single-gate; AMEND-3 specific writer-to-story split per Winston W5); Wave 5 (7c-18a + 7c-18b + 7c-19 single-gate + 7c-20a/b/c AUDIT-AC single-gate; all three own TW-7c-1 with AMEND-7c percentage-threshold firing rule); Wave 6 (7c-21 dual-gate cross-agent MANDATORY with STOP-on-TW-7c-6-fire branch per AMEND-7d-iii + 7c-21a single-gate Epic 3 retirement). 5 cross-agent code-review MANDATORY: 7c-0a, 7c-0b, 7c-3a, 7c-4b, 7c-21. NEW gate-mode dual-gate-cross-agent-CONTRACT-EVOLUTION promoted per Winston W3 (4 stories: 7c-5-g1/g2c/g3/g4); T1 readiness REQUIRES (a) diff-against-prior-contract artifact + (b) backward-consumer audit per call site + (c) AMELIA-P4 frozen-at-ship-hash delta-AC. Tripwires TW-7c-1..6 seeded at sprint-status.yaml::tripwire_events in not_yet_evaluated state in same commit. version bump -> 2026-05-04-slab7c-thirty-six-stories; triage_summary 84->120 / 21->28 dual / dual_gate_cross_agent_contract_evolution 0->4; dual_gate_pct 25%->23.3% (single-gate-heavy Slab 7c).

tripwire_escalation_record_path._comment: Round-(e) E2/Mary amendment (2026-04-29). Designated audit slot for K-aggregate tripwires fired during Slab 7b execution. The four named tripwires (Wave-1 close, Wave-2b close, Wave-3 first-port, Wave-5b pre-T1 — per Round-(a) Amelia A3 of Slab 7b epics-and-stories workflow) record their fired-or-not-fired verdict + escalation outcome at the path below. Lockstep follow-on: a `tripwire_events:` schema section was added to `sprint-status.yaml` in the same commit that unfroze this governance JSON, so the slot exists before any tripwire could fire. This applies to all migration stories carrying tripwire clauses (currently Slab 7b 7b-1/7b-5/7b-6/7b-11), not just Slab 7b — future tripwire-bearing stories reference this slot.

dual_gate_rationale_legend.schema_shape: Story introduces a new Pydantic v2 model family with four-file-lockstep (schema + validator + tests + golden fixture).
dual_gate_rationale_legend.ci_or_compile_shape: Story adds or changes a CI/graph-compile-time contract that affects every downstream story.
dual_gate_rationale_legend.lane_or_package_boundary: Story establishes or changes a lane-separation / package-boundary import-linter contract.
dual_gate_rationale_legend.invariant_preservation: Story preserves a load-bearing PRD invariant (FR34 HIL, FR40 lane separation, FR43 frozen-graph, etc.).
dual_gate_rationale_legend.operator_acceptance_gate: Story is a slab-closing or milestone go/no-go story with operator sign-off.
dual_gate_rationale_legend.substrate_shape: Story lays down substrate inherited by many downstream stories; mis-wiring has cascading cost.
dual_gate_rationale_legend.contract_evolution: Story extends an already-shipped contract to a post-slab-N contract, requiring (a) diff-against-prior-contract artifact reviewed BEFORE T2; (b) backward-consumer audit per call site; (c) AMELIA-P4 frozen-at-ship-hash delta-AC. Promoted to NAMED GATE-MODE (`dual-gate-cross-agent-CONTRACT-EVOLUTION`) per Winston W3 amendment Slab 7c Round-2 party-mode 2026-05-04. Distinct from `dual-gate` and from `dual-gate-cross-agent`.

1-1c.rationale: Reshaped 2026-04-22 via middle-path party-mode consensus: FastAPI smoke + MCP code substrate (protocol pin + handler + stdio wire-up) but NO MCP smoke (which moved to 1-1d). Pts grew 2→3; gate stays single.

1-1d.rationale: NEW story added 2026-04-22 via middle-path party-mode consensus on MCP-in-Slab-1. MCP stdio subprocess smoke + FastAPI↔MCP byte-equivalent parity assertion, runs nightly/on-merge (not per-PR), gates M1 acceptance for FR2 compound contract. Single-gate justified: not schema-shape, not lane-boundary, not invariant-preservation — just transport-parity test scaffold.

1-2.amendment_note: Bumped 2026-04-22 from Pts=3/K=1.5× per Amelia set-level review: 8 models (incl. OperatorVerdict per BLOCKER-1) × four-file-lockstep × triple-layer red-rejection × reproducibility-invariants × schema-pin emission = ~32 files; 31-1 precedent (1 model at K=1.5× → MUST-FIX) is the warning.

1-3.amendment_note: K bumped 2026-04-22 from 1.4× per Amelia: cross-story schema migration (replace 1.2 stub) + 3 new schemas + selector + adapter + cache-prefix stability is 1.6× minimum.

1-4.amendment_note: Scope expanded 2026-04-22 to include `app/gates/resume_api.py` stub + import-linter Contract C3 + ledger verdict-event shape stub per BLOCKER-1 honoring architecture §D3 Slab-1 distribution. Pts unchanged (5) — additions are signature stubs + one contract block, not load-bearing on K.

1-7.amendment_note: K bumped 2026-04-22 from 1.3× per Amelia: 3 polished docs + scaffold-conformance framework + anti-patterns catalog + 11-section migration guide + M1 evidence pack + retrospective convening + sprint-status hygiene is 1.4× realistic. Closing-story-drift risk.

2a-5._amendment_note: Added 2026-04-25 as 2a.1 follow-on defect (A12 procedural-coupling resolution path b). Generator auto-emits pyproject.toml C3 ignore_imports row alongside 9-file specialist tree; eliminates the 14-instance manual-edit flakiness vector across Slab 2b.1-2b.14. ~2pt, K-target ~1.4× (target 6-8 / floor 5). Single-gate justified: defect fix with no schema-shape risk surface, no lane/package boundary, no invariant preservation, no operator-acceptance gate. Party-mode T2 2026-04-24 ratification (Murat (b)-preferred path / Winston path-2 / Paige A12 procedural-coupling category). Slab-2a→2b binding gate per slab-2a-retrospective.md §Slab 2b kickoff readiness checklist hard gate 1.

2b-1.rationale: TEMPLATE: establishes the per-specialist migration scaffold pattern for 2b.2-2b.14.

5a-3.amendment_note: 2026-04-26 substrate-aware amendment: scope repointed from ≥50% reduction-vs-legacy bar to cost-engineering foundation (cascade + telemetry + characterization-on-migrated-runtime). See _amendment_log entry for full operator-ratified D1-D9 decision set.

6-0.amendment_note: Slab 6 substrate opener: production envelope + dispatch adapter + composition fixture. Path A-prime keeps specialists unchanged and proves Texas -> cd composition through tests/composition.

6-1.amendment_note: Re-scoped 2026-04-27 after Slab 6.0 insertion: runner consumes ProductionEnvelope + ProductionDispatchAdapter substrate; retains manifest composition, HIL pause/resume, trace binding, and live smoke/operator acceptance.

6-2.amendment_note: Filed 2026-04-27 after Slab 6.1 close per bmad-code-review DFR-6.1-1. Promotes dependency_map declaration from runner-layer fallback into pipeline manifest; preserves runner-layer fallback as the permanent resolution mechanism for undeclared or empty nodes. Slab 6 trial-experience bundle prerequisite (precedes 6.3 + 6.4 + 6.5).

6-3.amendment_note: Filed 2026-04-27 as Slab 6 trial-experience bundle item. Step 02A surfaces prior-run operator-directives.md as named defaults; eliminates re-entry burden on resumed/repeated runs. Operator-flagged 2026-04-19 trial. Single-gate: minor enhancement; no schema-shape risk.

6-4.amendment_note: Filed 2026-04-27 as Slab 6 trial-experience bundle item. Encodes validate-irene-pass2-handoff.py validator contract as explicit Pydantic v2 schema + authoring template. Operator-flagged HIGHEST friction step in production pipeline (2026-04-20 trial run B-Run §08). Dual-gate: new schema surface + existing validator contract preservation.

6-5.amendment_note: Filed 2026-04-27 as Slab 6 trial-experience bundle item. HUD per-step expandable summaries surface real-time content captured + locked at each pipeline step. Operator-flagged 2026-04-19 trial during Step 03 hold. Single-gate: HUD enhancement; no schema-shape risk; no substrate-touching contracts.

7a-1.amendment_note: Slab 7a opener: directive_composer.py closes trial-475 Gap 2 (silent gate-bypass from missing directive composition). Dual-gate justified: closes trial-475 root cause + introduces Composition Smoke gate evidence at slab-opener (Composition Spec §9). K=1.6× per directive-composer band 3.2-5K; ~3.5K target.

7a-2.amendment_note: Slab 7a wave-2: manifest fold-flags + compiler extension. Tier-2 minor manifest schema bump (additive `fold_with`/`fold_target` per-node fields); removes hardcoded PRODUCTION_GATE_IDS frozenset and derives from manifest at compile-time (FR-A8). Hard precondition: pipeline-manifest.yaml schema_version bump 'v4.2-migration-stub' → 'v4.2-migration-stub-with-fold-flags' landed via this same 2026-04-28 party-mode round.

7a-6.amendment_note: Slab 7a wave-3 (PROMOTED from wave-6 per Step 1 batch-approved adjustment — registry must precede stories that emit vocabulary into it). Vocabulary registry (Pydantic-v2 namespaced enum) + 34-row operator-control parity table. SG-1 + SG-2 primary structural enforcement here (FR-O20 row-count CI; FR-O21 specialist-roster build assertion).

7a-3.amendment_note: Slab 7a wave-3 (parallel with 7a-6): pre-gate-marcus shared LLM node. Single LLM call site before each conversational gate; C1 template-with-slots pre-fill with confidence + rationale; reads vocabulary registry from 7a-6.

k_contract.scope: HTML review-pack BOUNDED to skeleton-only (semantic structure + checkbox + delta-field; no full styling); full styling deferred to post-Slab-7a polish.
k_contract.rationale: K-target 1.4× against gate-shape band 2.4-2.8K positions 7a-4 at upper band edge (3.5K is 1.46× band-ceiling, 1.75× band-floor). The K-contract bounds scope to skeleton-only HTML; if K-actual exceeds 1.7× band-floor (4.08K), the dev round closes and party-mode consensus required to escalate to dual-gate.

7a-4.amendment_note: Slab 7a wave-4: per-slide subgraph + HTML review-pack skeleton. Subgraph-with-`interrupt()` fan-out for G2B/G2F-merged/G3B per-slide arrays. FM-3 AST scan critical (subgraph-degenerating-to-parent-graph-loop check). Single-gate WITH k_contract tripwire per Step 1 batch-approved adjustment.

7a-5.amendment_note: Slab 7a wave-4 (parallel with 7a-4): conversation persistence (SHA256 tamper-evident chain) + specialist-summary writer (15-25 line envelope per FR-O19). Postgres checkpointer additive evolution (ADR-D3); FR-A11-A14 cluster.

7a-7.amendment_note: Slab 7a wave-5 (parallel with start of 7a-8): A2 single-decision CLI shims for terminal gates G1/G2C/G3/G4. Audience-layered help text (OPERATOR/INPUTS/OUTPUTS/REFERENCE structure). Carries NFR-OD1/OD2 first-class story-scoped; 5 FRs after Mary's augment per Step 2 finding.

7a-8.amendment_note: Slab 7a wave-5 strict-last (FLIPPED from single-gate to dual-gate per Step 1 batch-approved adjustment — integration story; cross-story failure modes justify conservative review). Integration + parity-test suite (34-row mapping checklist 1:1) + Composition Spec invariant test suite (NFR-I8) + calibration-tripwire wiring + gate-bypass detection + max-3 oscillation guard + engagement-decay reporting + Slab 7a closeout artifacts. SG-1 + SG-2 + SG-3 aggregated structural enforcement here. Operator acceptance for trial-2 readiness predicate.

7b-1.amendment_note: Slab 7b Wave 1 (Class A hardening; Claude; slab-opener for Wave 1 parallelism). Texas hardening: live-retrieval-against-real-directive-composer + six-canonical-artifacts contract enforcement + G0 6-dim evidence-sentence rubric + word-count belt-and-suspenders + cross-validation hint application. Single-gate justified: rubric-semantics work; not schema-shape, not lane-boundary. T1 CREATE-tasks per Round-(a) Murat A4: SanctumParityTestBase (Errata 3) + _chain_test_base.py (NFR-CG14a) + class-conformance validator (NFR-I12) + Errata 4 subdir-vs-flat ratification. Wave-1 close tripwire: >2.7K LOC fires K-aggregate escalation; tripwire fired-verdict recorded at top-level `tripwire_escalation_record_path` per Round-(e) E2.

7b-2.prerequisite_rationale: Round-(e) E5/Murat. 7b-1 must land 4 T1 CREATE-tasks atomically (SanctumParityTestBase at tests/parity/_sanctum_parity_base.py, _chain_test_base.py at tests/composition/_chain_test_base.py, validate_parity_test_class_conformance.py at scripts/utilities/, Errata 4 subdir-vs-flat ratification in tests/parity/README.md) before 7b-2 opens. Substrate dependency: Quinn-R parity tests cannot derive their fixtures or class-shape without these bases. Sprint runner must NOT open 7b-2 until 7b-1's T1 CREATE-tasks land.
7b-2.amendment_note: Slab 7b Wave 1 (Class A hardening; Claude; parallel with 7b-1, 7b-3 — gated on 7b-1 T1 CREATE-tasks per `prerequisite_stories`). Quinn-R two-mode rubric (pre-composition / post-composition) + G2C storyboard-bound + G5 pre-composition QA (WPM + VTT monotonicity + coverage + motion-vs-narration coherence + advisory-vs-blocking partition). Single-gate justified: rubric-semantics work.

7b-3.prerequisite_rationale: Round-(e) E5/Murat. Same substrate dependency as 7b-2: Vera parity tests cannot derive their fixtures or class-shape without 7b-1's T1 CREATE-tasks (SanctumParityTestBase + _chain_test_base.py + class-conformance validator + Errata 4 ratification). Sprint runner must NOT open 7b-3 until 7b-1's T1 CREATE-tasks land.
7b-3.amendment_note: Slab 7b Wave 1 (Class A hardening; Claude; parallel with 7b-1, 7b-2 — gated on 7b-1 T1 CREATE-tasks per `prerequisite_stories`). Vera G0 6-dim evidence-sentence rubric on real Texas output + G1 ingestion-quality 6-dim verdicts + G3 fidelity check on real Storyboard A + G4 19-criterion rubric (G4-01..G4-19) + sensory-bridges dispatch on real motion+audio. Single-gate justified: rubric-semantics work.

7b-4.amendment_note: Slab 7b Wave 2a (Class B refresh; Claude; strict after Wave 1 — inherits Vera G4 rubric from 7b-3). Irene Pass-1 9-node scaffold mirroring Pass-2 (Slab 2a.2 precedent) + lesson-plan coauthoring + scope-lock contract + per-plan-unit ratification surface for G1A + mode-singularity hard-constraint + scope_decision.set + plan.locked learning-event emission. Single-gate justified: persona-continuity refresh; mirrors existing Pass-2 shape.

k_contract.scope: Class-C+ port-shape + sidecar emission BUNDLE bounded to: (1) Pass-2 research-shaped intent enrichment + (2) sidecar greenfield at _bmad/memory/bmad-agent-tracy/ (4-file BMB pattern: INDEX.md/PERSONA.md/chronology.md/access-boundaries.md). LLM-only (no third-party API integration; if scope drifts to API integration, party-mode + version-bump pre-promotion required mirroring Round-(b) Mary B1 / Round-(c) C1 amendment for Dan).
k_contract.tripwire_action: wave_2b_close_k_aggregate_escalation_per_round_a_amelia_a3 (records at top-level `tripwire_escalation_record_path`; if fired: Wave-3 first-port (7b-6) opens at upper-band K-target; 7b-7+7b-8 pre-authorized for dual-gate escalation via their `conditional_gate_override` hooks)
k_contract.rationale: K-target 1.5× against Class-C+ band; tripwire at 2.7K is the Wave-2b close trigger consistent with Wave-1 close threshold per Round-(a) Amelia A3 four-tripwire framework.

7b-5.required_ac_reference_rationale: Round-(e) E4/Amelia. Tracy's research-shaped intent enrichment touches the Texas retrieval-lane interface contract. AC coverage of the Tracy↔Texas retrieval-shape interface is required (not optional). bmad-create-story on 7b-5 reads this file at T1 and the resulting story spec must explicitly cite it in the relevant ACs.
7b-5.amendment_note: Slab 7b Wave 2b (Class C+ port-shape + sidecar emission BUNDLE; Codex per NFR-CG17 + D21; strict after Wave 2a). Tracy research-shaped intent enrichment for Pass-2 + sidecar greenfield at _bmad/memory/bmad-agent-tracy/ (4-file BMB pattern). Live LLM-only (no third-party API; sandbox-AC inventory entry NOT required for Tracy specifically per R5 Amelia-scope-amendment). Single-gate justified per Slab 2b.1 TEMPLATE pattern. K-target 1.5× per Class-C+ K-bump (port-shape WITH sidecar emission).

7b-6.amendment_note: Slab 7b Wave 3 (Class C API-bound; Codex per NFR-CG17; first port-shape; consumes FR107 sandbox-AC `gamma` LANDED Wave 0). Gary port-shape: Gamma API live invocation + per-slide variant generation (DOUBLE_DISPATCH branch) + theme-handshake + PNG export normalization + Vera G3 invocation hooks + cache-hit-rate ≥85% post-warm-up + live-API-on-CI strict prohibition. Single-gate per Slab 2b.1 TEMPLATE. Wave-3 first-port tripwire: >2.7K LOC → fired-verdict recorded at top-level `tripwire_escalation_record_path` per Round-(e) E2 → 7b-7 Kira + 7b-8 Enrique gate-mode flips to dual-gate via their `conditional_gate_override` structural hooks per Round-(e) E3.

conditional_gate_override.trigger_check_owner: sprint runner at 7b-7 story-open (must read `tripwire_escalation_record_path` for 7b-6 close-verdict)
conditional_gate_override.override_rationale: Round-(e) E3/Mary. If 7b-6 (Gary) closes above 2.7K LOC, the Wave-3 first-port tripwire signals the Codex-port template is not amortizing as expected. 7b-7 (Kira) and 7b-8 (Enrique) both inherit the same Slab 2b.1 TEMPLATE pattern as 7b-6, so cross-port failure-mode risk justifies escalating their gate mode. Mirrors Round-(a) Amelia A3 four-tripwire framework with structural enforcement (not prose-only).

7b-7.amendment_note: Slab 7b Wave 3 (Class C API-bound; Codex; parallel with 7b-6, 7b-8; consumes FR107 sandbox-AC `kling`). Kira port-shape: Kling API live invocation + motion generation per motion_plan.yaml + per-slide .progress.json + terminal .json receipts + reviewer inspection pack at [BUNDLE_PATH]/recovery/inspection/ + fail-closed budget rules + cache-hit-rate ≥85%. Default single-gate per Slab 2b.1 TEMPLATE; conditional dual-gate override via `conditional_gate_override` if 7b-6 first-port tripwire fires.

conditional_gate_override.trigger_check_owner: sprint runner at 7b-8 story-open (must read `tripwire_escalation_record_path` for 7b-6 close-verdict)
conditional_gate_override.override_rationale: Round-(e) E3/Mary. Mirrors 7b-7 conditional escalation; same cross-port failure-mode argument: if Slab 2b.1 TEMPLATE pattern fails to amortize on 7b-6, both 7b-7 and 7b-8 escalate together because they share the template.

7b-8.amendment_note: Slab 7b Wave 3 (Class C API-bound; Codex; parallel with 7b-6, 7b-7; consumes FR107 sandbox-AC `elevenlabs`). Single-gate per Slab 2b.1 TEMPLATE.

k_contract.scope: Class-D1 LLM-greenfield bounded to: (1) SKILL.md (option-a sanctum-aligned); (2) sidecar at _bmad/memory/bmad-agent-dan/ (full BMB pattern); (3) app/specialists/dan/ scaffold-v0.2 instantiation; (4) _act body shaped as narrow-lane creative-director aux contributions threaded G1-G2. EXCLUDES third-party-API integration — if T1 dan-api-tbd resolution lands as third-party-API, Round-(b) B1 / Round-(c) C1 binding requires party-mode consensus + governance-JSON version bump pre-promotion (dev-agent does NOT unilaterally promote).
k_contract.tripwire_action: escalate_to_party_mode_for_scope_review (records at top-level `tripwire_escalation_record_path`; >4K signals likely scope creep, most plausibly an API integration leak that should have triggered B1/C1 promotion gating)
k_contract.rationale: K-target 1.5× per Class-D1 greenfield-uplift bump (defensible against 27-2 / 31-1 precedents per Round-(e) Amelia note). Tripwire 4.0K = ~2.67× band-floor; well above K-target band-ceiling. Scope-creep signal.

7b-10.amendment_note: Slab 7b Wave 5a (Class D1 LLM-greenfield; Claude per D21; strict after Waves 1-3 closed per R8 Winston-amendment). Dan greenfield via bmad-create-specialist: SKILL.md (option-a sanctum-aligned) + sidecar at _bmad/memory/bmad-agent-dan/ (full BMB pattern) + app/specialists/dan/ scaffold-v0.2 + _act narrow-lane creative-director aux contributions threaded G1-G2. Round-(b) Mary B1 / Round-(c) C1 amendment: if Dan resolves to third-party-API, sandbox-AC inventory promotion requires party-mode consensus + governance-JSON version bump pre-dev (dev-agent does NOT unilaterally promote). K-target 1.5× per Class-D1 greenfield-uplift bump.

conditional_dual_gate_escalation.trigger_check_owner: dev-agent at story T1 (before any code is written)
conditional_dual_gate_escalation.escalation_action: story_gate_mode := dual-gate; record decision in `_amendment_log` and at top-level `tripwire_escalation_record_path`; downstream gate ceremony (Gate-2 operator-witnessed) added to story workflow
conditional_dual_gate_escalation.rationale: Round-(e) E1/John (binding-hard amendment to Round-(b) Amelia B2 / Round-(c) C2). PRD risk model flags Compositor as greenfield-adjacent with sidecar complexity. Round-(b)/(c) prose-only conditional was insufficient — this structural field makes the K-projection check a hard gate, not advisory. Dev-agent T1 K-projection >4K is a non-discretionary trigger; gate mode flips before any code is written.

k_contract.rationale: K-target 1.5× per Class-D2 greenfield-uplift bump. >4K = D2 pipeline complexity confirmed beyond sidecar pattern; dual-gate required to absorb cross-component failure-mode risk.

k_contract.rationale: K-target 1.6× against integration-tier band; mirrors 7a-8 K-target. >4.8K = 1.7× band-floor edge per 7a-4 K-contract pattern; integration stories bloat predictably and a structural ceiling forces explicit scope conversation.
